creator: henry.hu.sh@gmail.com
text:
The default style for gtk3 is adwaita, and it is also the fallback style.
It depends on adwaita-icon-theme to function correctly. Else, you would see missing icons on the program interface.
gnome-icon-theme-symbolic provides some of the icons, but other icons are in adwaita-icon-theme.
Please make gtk3 depend on adwaita-icon-theme, or else users would be confused by the missing icons. I've spent several hours to find the reason, first gnome-icon-theme-symbolic and then adwaita-icon-theme.
I found it by using GTK_DEBUG=icontheme and compare the results with my Arch machine. If you check arch's gtk3, it depends on adwaita-icon-theme:

https://www.archlinux.org/packages/extra/i686/gtk3/
